text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > COVID-19 Immunization Clinics * Native American Community 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter No Filter Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF COQUILLE INDIAN TRIBE KO-KWEL WELLNESS CENTER COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services to individuals and families. COVID-19 vaccines available; brand is Spikevax which is manufactured by Moderna. 630 Miluk Drive Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members, children of tribal members, and residents of the community as capacity allows COVID-19 vaccinations: Tribal members, CIT employees, Kilkich residents, and KWC patients Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Vaccinations: Fridays by appointment Medical Helpline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 888-9494 1 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COQUILLE INDIAN TRIBE COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER
